name: Robin T2 PC
comment: Robin T2 PC™: T2. Multispectral perfection, only further! While simultaneously maintaining the absolute colour finesse of Robe’s phenomenally successful T1 series, featuring the MSL™ (Multi-Spectral) LED engine, our T2 PC™ provides an enhanced output of over 16.000 lumens, measured at the front lens, via its 850W MSL™ source.

capabilities.comment: BO while PAN TILT moving: ON
BO while PAN TILT moving: OFF
Quiet mode  Fans ON at blackout
Quiet mode  Fans OFF at blackout
Colour mixing mode: CMY (DMX mode 1 and 2 only)
Colour mixing mode: RGB (DMX mode 1 and 2 only)
Filter 281 (Three Quarter CT Blue) (Three Quarter CT Blue)
Filter 285 (Three Quarter CT Orange) (Three Quarter CT Orange)
Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour mix)
Crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix
Pulse closing from slow to fast
Pulse opening from fast to slow
Pulse closing from slow to fast
Pulse opening from fast to slow
Random strobe from slow to fast

While simultaneously maintaining the absolute colour finesse of Robe’s phenomenally successful T1 series, featuring the MSL™ (Multi-Spectral) LED engine, our T2 PC™ provides an enhanced output of over 16.000 lumens, measured at the front lens, via its 850W MSL™ source.
